name: Swordfish Kebabs
intro: Swordfish lends itself very well to kebabs as it has a firm flesh.
method: String the fish cubes onto wooden or steel skewers (if using wooden skewers, soak them first in water, so that they will not burn on the grill). After every third fish cube add a fresh bay leaf on the skewer.
In a mortar, mix all the marinade ingredients together well. Pour this marinade over the fish skewers and let rest for about 15 minutes.
Grill the fish under a very hot grill for about 3–4 minutes, turning the skewers so that the fish is nicely coloured all over. Serve with the salsa verde.
